new_classes.label_en: Fermentation process for other fermented beverages (CN 2206)
new_classes.definition_en: A fermentation process that produces beverages falling under CN heading 2206, including cider, perry, mead, saké, and other fermented beverages, as well as mixtures of fermented beverages and mixtures of fermented beverages with non-alcoholic beverages, not elsewhere specified or included.

new_classes.label_en: Other fermented beverage or mixture quality
new_classes.label_de: Qualität anderer gegorener Getränke oder Mischungen
new_classes.definition_en: A quality borne by a beverage that has been produced by fermentation (other than that of fresh grapes/grape must, malt, or producing ethyl alcohol ≥ 80% vol), or is a mixture of fermented beverages, or a mixture of fermented and non-alcoholic beverages, not elsewhere specified or included in the CN. Covers cider, perry, mead, saké, and analogous products.

new_classes.label_en: Other fermented beverages (e.g. cider, perry, mead, saké); mixtures of fermented beverages and mixtures of fermented beverages and non-alcoholic beverages, not elsewhere specified or included (CN 2206)
new_classes.label_de: Andere gegorene Getränke (z. B. Apfelwein, Birnenwein, Met, Sake); Mischungen gegorener Getränke und Mischungen gegorener Getränke mit nicht alkoholischen Getränken, anderweit weder genannt noch inbegriffen (KN 2206)
new_classes.definition_en: Beverages produced by fermentation (other than those classified under headings 2203–2205 or 2207–2208) and mixtures thereof with each other or with non-alcoholic beverages, not elsewhere specified or included in the CN. Includes cider, perry, mead, saké, and analogous fermented beverages. Products obtained through fermentation retain classification here provided they retain the character of products of this heading.

coverage_explanation: The core product identity (fermented beverage not elsewhere classified, including cider, perry, mead, saké, and mixtures of fermented beverages with each other or with non-alcoholic beverages) is captured via the FermentationProcess2206 production process restriction and the OtherFermentedBeverageMixtureQuality quality restriction on the product class, together with complement restrictions excluding the sibling headings 2203, 2204, 2205, 2207, and 2208. The legal text's key "not elsewhere specified or included" principle and the character-retention rule for fermented products are modelled as far as OWL restrictions allow. Coverage is not complete at 1.0 because: (1) the legal note is truncated (ends mid-sentence), so there may be additional scope limitations not visible in the provided text; (2) the distinction between 'mixture of fermented beverages' vs. 'mixture of fermented and non-alcoholic beverages' sub-types within 2206 cannot be discriminated at this heading level without further subheading information; (3) the character-retention rule for fermented products is expressed only in the natural-language definition and not as a formal OWL axiom, as it is inherently open-world.
